name: Sanguine Gathering
description: One Skill gains: "[On Use] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast (Min.10), gain 1 Sanguine  for every 5 Bloodfeast consumed."

name: Sanguine Spear (Repeating)
description: One die gains: "[Check] Consume up to (Cost*10(Min.10)) Bloodfeast, this die gains +1 Power for every 10 Bloodfeast consumed."

name: Rotting (Repeating)
description: One die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Bleed next Scene. You may Consume (Cost*10) (Min.10)) Bloodfeast to also inflict 1 Bleed the Scene after."

name: Consuming Blood
description: One skill gains: "[On Kill] Gain Bloodfeast equal to target's Bleed X 10. This Skill can only be taken on Skills with a Cost of 1 or higher."

name: Blood Shield
description: One non-counter Block die gains: "[Check] Consume up to (Cost*10(Min.10)) Bloodfeast , gain +1 Power."

name: Fear of Water
description: One skill gains: "[Eminence] if the target has any Sinking , all non-counter Offensive dice on this skill lose 1 power, and all non-counter Defensive dice on this skill gain +2 power."

name: Crimson Flame
description: One die gains: "[Hit] Inflict Burn on target equal to (Sanguine Stage+1)."
